falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single daily session
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern relied on a higher-low structure; a break below this level confirms distribution rather than accumulation, invalidating the 79% pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Persistent fear elevation contradicts the 'blowoff score' of 39 which implies complacency/late-cycle exhaustion; sustained VIX >25 confirms panic-driven selling, not a bottoming formation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50 basis points
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion signals accelerating recession risk that the pattern match failed to capture; the aug_2024 bottom occurred during spread normalization, so further inversion proves macro divergence from the matched template

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
